data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for fraud detection, specifically regarding self-referrals and fake accounts. While the linked use case mentions that the fraud system flags suspicious self-referral patterns, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how this detection is implemented or verified through API reads or persisted state checks. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the fulfillment of this requirement.
gaps: No concrete evidence of how fraud detection for self-referrals and fake accounts is implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for fraud detection mechanism
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls and assertions that verify the fraud detection functionality.
